## LibraryRuntime.ProducedConfectionBase.getSerializedHistory() method

Gets the serialized editing history for persistence. Captures current state, original state, and undo/redo stacks.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getSerializedHistory(original: T): Session.ISerializedEditingHistoryEntity<T>;
```
